text:
1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: 0 = No Benefit plan Information (e.g., PACE and employer plans) 
1 = Defined Standard benefit 
2 = Actuarially Equivalent Standard 
3 = Basic Alternative 
4 = Enhanced Alternative 
9 = Part C only plan (no Part D benefit) 

COMMENT: The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to 
CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS). 

Employer and National Program of All-inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) plans are
